root.speaker: npc
root.text: Sap con khoai lang khong con?

options.label: Da con, khoai bui deo moi dao a!
Con khoai hoi nho thoi a.
Da 12 ngan 1 ky, deo lam luon a!

ask_small.speaker: npc
ask_small.text: Nho cung duoc, luoc an vat thoi ma.

options.label: Da con can lien cho co/chu!
Da het khoai nho roi a.

ask_amount.speaker: npc
ask_amount.text: Vay can cho toi 0.8 ky nhe.

options.label: Da con can du cho co/chu ngay!
Da khoai to sap het roi a.

leaf_buy_small.speaker: npc
leaf_buy_small.text: Cho 0.6 ky khoai nho thoi, luoc an vat.

leaf_buy_medium.speaker: npc
leaf_buy_medium.text: 0.8 ky nha, can du can nhe kheo thieu.

leaf_decline_price.speaker: npc
leaf_decline_price.text: Mac vay ha, thoi de toi hoi sap ben canh.

leaf_decline_stock.speaker: npc
leaf_decline_stock.text: Vay thoi, lan sau ghe lai mua tiep.
